records.v: Granuloma on caudal thoracic air sac
Unidentified big mass in the celomic cavity in abdominal air sac. Notable to see the gonads ,but have female ring from origin
Severe abdominal distantion , unable to see anything during endoscopy because presence of bleeding in the access. X-ray taken
